## W3C XSD Test Suite (W3C Document License)

- **Source:** https://github.com/w3c/xsdtests (git submodule)
- **Location:** `testdata/upstream/w3c-xsdtests/` (submodule, not redistributed)
- **License:** W3C Document License

This test suite is referenced via a git submodule pointing to a pinned commit
in the https://github.com/w3c/xsdtests repository. It is not redistributed as
part of this project's source tree. See the W3C Document License at
https://www.w3.org/Consortium/Legal/2015/doc-license for terms.
